recipe.title: Quick green pasta
recipe.description: This recipe is a really typical lunch or dinner for us – think of it as a principle, and flex the veg you use depending on what you’ve got.

ingredients.name: large handful of tenderstem broccoli spears
Parmesan cheese
ingredients.note: Grana Padano or vegetarian alternative, plus extra to serve

ingredients.name: optional: fresh herbs
ingredients.note: such as basil, parsley or mint

steps.descr: Trim and slice the spring onions
steps.instructions: Trim and slice the spring onions. Trim the leek, halve it lengthways, wash it, then finely slice. Finely slice the broccoli stalks, reserving the tips.

on_enter.say: Trim and slice the spring onions. Trim the leek, halve it lengthways, wash it, then finely slice. Finely slice the broccoli stalks, reserving the tips.

steps.descr: Put a large, non-stick, shallow casserole pan on a...
steps.instructions: Put a large, non-stick, shallow casserole pan on a medium heat.

on_enter.say: Put a large, non-stick, shallow casserole pan on a medium heat.

steps.descr: Put 1 tablespoon of olive oil into the pan, with the...
steps.instructions: Put 1 tablespoon of olive oil into the pan, with the spring onions, leeks and broccoli stalks. Peel and finely chop the garlic and add to the pan.

on_enter.say: Put 1 tablespoon of olive oil into the pan, with the spring onions, leeks and broccoli stalks. Peel and finely chop the garlic and add to the pan.

steps.descr: Add the frozen spinach and peas, then add a pinch of sea...
steps.instructions: Add the frozen spinach and peas, then add a pinch of sea salt and black pepper.

on_enter.say: Add the frozen spinach and peas, then add a pinch of sea salt and black pepper.

steps.descr: Cook for 10 to 15 minutes, or until soft but not...
steps.instructions: Cook for 10 to 15 minutes, or until soft but not coloured and the spinach has defrosted, stirring regularly.

on_enter.say: Cook for 10 to 15 minutes, or until soft but not coloured and the spinach has defrosted, stirring regularly.

steps.descr: Meanwhile, cook the pasta in a large pan of boiling...
steps.instructions: Meanwhile, cook the pasta in a large pan of boiling salted water, according to the packet instructions, adding the broccoli florets for the last 2 minutes.

on_enter.say: Meanwhile, cook the pasta in a large pan of boiling salted water, according to the packet instructions, adding the broccoli florets for the last 2 minutes.

steps.descr: While everything is ticking away, finely grate the Parmesan
steps.instructions: While everything is ticking away, finely grate the Parmesan.

on_enter.say: While everything is ticking away, finely grate the Parmesan.

steps.descr: Scoop or pour out about 200ml of cooking water from the...
steps.instructions: Scoop or pour out about 200ml of cooking water from the pasta into your veg pan. Now, you can either leave your sauce chunky, blitz it until smooth in a blender, or use a hand blender to go somewhere in between – it’s up to you.

on_enter.say: Scoop or pour out about 200ml of cooking water from the pasta into your veg pan. Now, you can either leave your sauce chunky, blitz it until smooth in a blender, or use a hand blender to go somewhere in between – it’s up to you.

steps.descr: Drain the pasta and broccoli, and tip it into the sauce
steps.instructions: Drain the pasta and broccoli, and tip it into the sauce. Add 1 tablespoon of extra virgin olive oil and the grated Parmesan, and toss it all together.

on_enter.say: Drain the pasta and broccoli, and tip it into the sauce. Add 1 tablespoon of extra virgin olive oil and the grated Parmesan, and toss it all together.

steps.descr: I like to finish this with a sprinkling of fresh herbs –...
steps.instructions: I like to finish this with a sprinkling of fresh herbs – parsley, basil, thyme, whatever you’ve got. A little extra grating of Parmesan is always nice, and a big salad on the side.

on_enter.say: I like to finish this with a sprinkling of fresh herbs – parsley, basil, thyme, whatever you’ve got. A little extra grating of Parmesan is always nice, and a big salad on the side.
